settings.heading: Engine Builds
settings.subtext: Full engine builds and rebuilds done properly - measured, assembled and set up to spec so it lasts and performs the way it should.

settings.title: Measured & Precise
settings.text: Clearances checked and set to spec, not guessed - the difference between a build that lasts and one that doesn't.

settings.title: Standard Or Performance
settings.text: From a tidy factory rebuild to a serious performance combination, built to suit.

settings.title: Quality Parts
settings.text: We use parts we trust and machining done right, so the engine holds up.

settings.heading: Engines Built To Last
settings.body1: Full engine builds and rebuilds done properly, from worn-out daily drivers to serious performance builds. Measured, assembled and set up to spec so it lasts and performs the way it should.
settings.body2: Every build is measured and assembled with care, using quality parts and proper machining, so you get an engine you can trust for the long haul.
settings.points: Full builds & rebuilds | Performance & standard specs | Precise, measured assembly | Built to last
settings.cta_label: Talk to Us About a Build
settings.strip_sub: Tell us the engine and what you're chasing, and we'll talk you through it.
settings.strip_btn_label: Talk to Us About a Build

settings.title: Book Your Car In
settings.copy: Send through your details and what you need, and we'll get back to you to book you in or track down a part.
